title: selaginella reineckei
intro: Selaginella reineckei, also known as the Indian spikenard or Indian valerian, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and sedative effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and arthritis. Selaginella reineckei can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
